ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source identifier of the device */,
  "polling_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the polling mechanism for the device */,
  "request_bits" TEXT /* Bits used for requests to the device */,
  "hardware_clear" TEXT /* Indicates if hardware clearing is required */,
  "vector_address" TEXT /* Address for the interrupt vector */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device type */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "last_poll_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last poll */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type (e.g., Sensor, Actuator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type and its uses */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device this configuration belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the setting was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, technician) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions granted to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., configuration update) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., status change, configuration error) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the action was performed on */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device related to the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, update) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device whose configuration is being tracked */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the configuration setting */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the configuration setting */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_history_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device associated with the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes in the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_versions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_status_history" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device whose status is being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status changed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_status_history_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_history" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being polled */,
  "poll_date" TEXT /* Date when the poll occurred */,
  "poll_result" TEXT /* Result of the poll (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the poll was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the poll was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_history_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
